description: Canonical list of template paths instances may sync. Single source of truth for audit; update when adding or renaming paths.

paths.description: Concept: Record, Voice, education structure, knowledge boundary, invariants, long-term objectives.
Protocol: Sovereign Merge Rule, schema (SELF, self-skill-*, self-evidence), evidence linking.
Definition of seed phase; what creates initial Record.
Permanent system rules (democratize Alpha-style education; sovereignty; knowledge boundary).
Skill-work parent index (submodules: skill-work-alpha-school, skill-work-human-teacher).
Alpha School reference (skill-work-alpha-school submodule): benchmarks, 2-hour screen-time target, equivalent metrics.
Structured Alpha benchmarks (YAML) with evidence IDs; optional comparison targets.
Alpha/Moonshots #233 insights for business plan and white paper (skill-work-alpha-school submodule).
Human teaching/learning objectives (skill-work-human-teacher submodule): read and modulate skill-think.
Skill-work-human-teacher submodule index.
Instance patterns and reference implementation (Grace-Mar variations, analyst contract, staging format).
Conflict resolution types; preserve history; advisory conflict check; links to engine spec.
Review surface for recursion-gate; derived UI; contradiction escalation; reference Grace-Mar inbox.
Contradiction engine: identity-diff object, classification, API shape, temporal validity, audit.
SELF schema/structure scaffold for new users only.
IX-A: what they've learned (self-knowledge) scaffold.
Durable identity commitments scaffold (identity, boundaries, role commitments).
IX-B: what they're curious about (self-curiosity) scaffold.
IX-C: voice, preferences, values (self-personality) scaffold.
THINK (self-skill-think) scaffold.
WRITE (self-skill-write) scaffold.
WORK (self-skill-work) scaffold.
Cross-lane self-work control-plane scaffold.
Evidence schema/structure scaffold.
Recursive-gate staging scaffold (candidates at the gate).
Ephemeral context scaffold.
SELF-LIBRARY scaffold: governance + empty entries; reference-facing shelf (not IX-A).
Optional legacy LIB row example (grace-mar-derived); not the default template shelf.
Canonical 10 challenges + 5 open mysteries; evolution rules for template and instances.
Layer labels, forbidden crossing globs for mechanical checks.
Checklist: durable identity vs operational self-work vs ephemeral memory.
Validates optional YAML frontmatter on users/**/*.md when present.
Enforces docs/layer-map.json forbiddenCrossings globs.
Interactive human gate; skipped when CI=true or --yes.
Writes state/provenance/record-docs-summary.json for users/ and docs/ (output gitignored).
Heuristic must-persist token density under users/.
Starter schema registry manifest pointer.
Minimal bridge confidence JSON schema stub.
